corePrinciples: ARMOR WITH CURVE DISCIPLINE: Keep the interface powerful and industrial, but replace harsh blockiness with controlled, smooth corner radii. Prefer 12px-24px radii for cards, panels, and controls, while preserving a dense armored feel.
TYPOGRAPHY MUST YELL: Heavy font weights (800, 900), strictly uppercase text for all labels and headers, and wide letter spacing to establish authority.
THE GARAGE GYM LIGHTING: The base is pitch black and dark gray. Contrast is achieved through harsh neon, blood-red accents, and pure white data points.
PHYSICAL INTERACTIVITY: Interactions must feel heavy but fluid. Use tight spring animations with smoother easing so elements compress with weight instead of snapping like rigid blocks.
HIERARCHY THROUGH SMOOTH ARMOR: Rely on strong borders, layered surfaces, rounded containment, and stark high-contrast shadows rather than playful softness or feathered elevation.
DYNAMIC GRIT: Use subtle, menacing ambient effects (like smoldering embers or pulsing red glows) for highly critical actions (e.g., 'BATTLE' or 'COMPETE').

primaryActionTrigger.description: Massive, unmissable, armored control used for starting workouts, now with smoother containment.
primaryActionTrigger.structure: Outer container with thick red border, inner content split between icon, title/subtitle, and heavy chevron.

tacticalDataBlock.description: Used for vitals (Weight, Height, XP) and stats.
tacticalDataBlock.structure: Top border only to signify a slotted piece of data, but housed inside a rounded armored shell.

operationHistoryCard.description: Gritty row for workout logs or leaderboards.
operationHistoryCard.structure: Heavy left border indicator showing completion/status with smoother outer corners.

hudProgressTrack.description: Industrial nested progress bars (like XP bars).
hudProgressTrack.structure: Outer track (armor), Inner track (empty slot), Fill (colored progress).

floatingNavigationPill.structure: Thick-bordered pill, elevated massively above content with a deep brutalist shadow.

smolderingFurnaceEffect.description: Ambient visual effect for the BATTLE/COMPETE state.
smolderingFurnaceEffect.structure: A pulsing core glow at the base, paired with 15-20 small, upward-drifting animated View particles.

physics.particles: Size 10-25px, Colors: #b91c1c, #8b0000, #ff4500. TranslateY upwards by -30 to -70px over 600-1400ms.
physics.pillReaction: When active, the floating pill border turns #8b0000, background turns #1a0e0e, and shadow becomes a glowing #ff0000.

replicationBlueprint.step1_environmentalSetup: Set the root View or ScrollView background to `#050505` or `#0a0a0a`. Apply a bottom padding of at least 110px if the Floating Navigation Pill is present. Keep horizontal padding strict (16px).
replicationBlueprint.step2_typographyAnnihilation: Hunt down all text. Force `textTransform: 'uppercase'`. Apply `fontWeight: '800'` or `'900'`. Add `letterSpacing: 1` or `2` for labels. Make data values pure white (`#fff`) and massive. Make labels `#666` and tiny (10px).
replicationBlueprint.step3_structuralArmorPlating: Replace harsh blocky radii with smooth, disciplined curvature. Prefer `borderRadius: 12`, `16`, or `20` for cards and surfaces, and reserve fully pill-shaped rounding for navigation or segmented controls. Keep borders strong (`'#222'` or `'#333'`) so the UI still feels armored rather than soft.
replicationBlueprint.step4_hudDataStructures: When displaying metrics, always separate the label from the data. Put labels above or below data values in a stack. If there is a bar chart or progress bar, use the `hudProgressTrack` nested border approach (Armor > Slot > Fill).
replicationBlueprint.step5_brutalistDepth: Do not use standard iOS/Android subtle shadows. Use strong offsets and dark shadows, but pair them with rounded containment so elements feel like machined steel modules instead of rigid blocks.
replicationBlueprint.step6_physicalInteractions: Wrap all interactive elements in `TouchableOpacity` with `activeOpacity={0.85}`. For primary buttons or tab icons, use `Animated.spring` to trigger a subtle `scale: 1.03` and `translateY: 3` for a heavy press-in effect that feels smooth and controlled.
replicationBlueprint.step7_grittyHighlights: Use `#b91c1c` (Gritty Red) for active tab indicators, primary borders, or major call-to-actions. Avoid using primary red for large background fills; keep it as a stark, glowing accent against the pitch black.
